_meta.review_warning: AI-drafted v0. DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION until reviewed by a qualified Vic WHS practitioner and approved. Shotcrete is high-velocity material projection — eye and respiratory protection are non-negotiable.

hazards.title: Concrete burns / dermatitis (worse than wet pour due to particle velocity)
hazards.risk: High-velocity wet shotcrete impacting skin / eyes

controls.title: Full face shield (not just glasses) for nozzleman and assistants
Waterproof spray suit or heavy overalls + long sleeves
Wash station immediately available; eye-wash bottle in kit

hazards.title: Hose whip / blockage release
hazards.risk: Hose blockage release projecting nozzle and material

controls.title: Whip checks on every hose coupling
No personnel in line with hose end during start-up or clearing blockage
Competent / certified nozzleman; daily equipment inspection

hazards.title: Rebound material dust + silica
hazards.risk: Respirable dust from rebound material; cement and silica content

controls.title: P3 half-face respirator (fit-tested) for nozzleman and assistants
Clear rebound material progressively; do not allow build-up underfoot
Class 5 ear muffs for all personnel in pump/compressor area

tasks: Pre-start: reinforcement signed off, drawings on site, mix design confirmed with supplier.
Equipment pre-start: pump, compressor, hoses, whip checks; spare nozzles on hand.
Position pump and compressor; agree communication signals between nozzleman and pump operator.
Toolbox with full crew including delivery driver(s): hand signals, blockage procedure, line-clearing procedure.
Set up wash station, eye-wash bottle, first aid kit.
Pump primed per supplier procedure; no personnel in line with hose end.
Nozzleman applies in sequential layers per spec; assistant manages hose, clears rebound.
Stop and assess if hose blockage; follow blockage-clear procedure; restart with no personnel in line.
Continue progressively; ensure consistent layer thickness per spec.
Finishing: cut joints / form features as required.
Post-pour: hose / pump cleaned per equipment procedure; wash water captured to bund, not to drain.
Curing plan in place: wet cure / cure compound per spec, duration noted in Hub.
Sign off completion in Hub; record any defects + remediation.
